name: Portal Notify Tool
description: Relays agent notifications (task completion / inquiry arrival / followup reminders) to the easy.flow portal, which delivers them to tenant members via LINE or email. Provides the `notify_send` tool to AI agents.

origin.description: Portal origin (e.g. https://easy-flow-real-estate-portal.fly.dev). Falls back to PORTAL_ORIGIN env var.

notificationToken.description: Per-subscription bearer token (UUID) issued by the portal. Falls back to PORTAL_NOTIFICATION_TOKEN env var.

timeoutMs.description: HTTP timeout for portal calls (ms). Default 5000.

retryFailedDelaysMs.description: Delay schedule (ms) for retrying 502 / network failures. Empty array disables retry.

retryPendingDelayMs.description: Delay (ms) before re-sending when portal returns pending status.

retryPendingMaxAttempts.description: Maximum number of pending re-send attempts. 0 disables pending retry.
